shape.layout: Q/dO H-major producer gate; K/V contiguous selected rows
shape.kernel_owner: token-major H64 x N64, four H16 warp subtiles

read.positive: The corrected HipKittens token-major H64/N64 producer compiles on MI350 with no spills and runs finite at the production B4/S4096/C4 dimensions.
read.negative: It is not a speed path: the producer/scratch gate is 13.07 ms before exact LI selected-slot gather, production dQ, dOriKV, route-aware dCmpKV, and dSinks. It does not improve over the earlier H16/N256 token-major gate and remains slower than the q-chunk D512 producer gate.
read.decision: Do not promote this HipKittens token-major branch. The next SharedKV candidate should preserve the existing Triton H64/N64 source-boundary schedule more directly or move to a lower-level cooperative HIP/CK/rocWMMA kernel that does not require H-major layout conversion.

commands.build: docker run --rm --entrypoint bash --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video --ipc=host --cap-add=SYS_PTRACE --security-opt seccomp=unconfined -v /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527:/workspace/exp -w /workspace/exp/tools/dsv4_runtime_probe/hipkittens_sharedkv_owner onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori -lc 'make hk_sharedkv_qm_h64n64_d512_score ATTN_B=4 ATTN_Q_N=4096 ATTN_KV_N=1024'
commands.run: docker run --rm --entrypoint bash --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video --ipc=host --cap-add=SYS_PTRACE --security-opt seccomp=unconfined -v /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527:/workspace/exp -w /workspace/exp/tools/dsv4_runtime_probe onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori -lc 'PYTHONPATH=/workspace/exp/tools/dsv4_runtime_probe/hipkittens_sharedkv_owner python3 probe_hipkittens_sharedkv_qm_h64n64_d512_score.py --batch 4 --seq 4096 --kv-seq 1024 --selected 512 --heads 64 --kv-heads 1 --dim 512 --warmup 5 --iters 30'
